description: Configure the company branding, SMTP outgoing server, and core preferences in Vtiger CRM for Apex Wholesale Distribution. Set the company details to: Name 'Apex Wholesale Distribution', Address '4500 Commerce Blvd, Suite 200', City 'Chicago', State 'IL', Postal Code '60607', Country 'USA', Phone '+1-312-555-0144', and Website 'www.apexwholesale.example.com'. Configure the outgoing SMTP server with: Server 'smtp.example-mail.com:587', User 'smtp_user_apex', Password 'ApexSecurePass2025!', From Email 'billing@apexwholesale.example.com', and enable authentication. Update the configuration editor with: Help Desk Support Email 'support@apexwholesale.example.com', Maximum Upload Size '5' MB, and Default Module 'Potentials'. Ensure all changes are saved across all sections.
